notes: Historical context is sourced externally. Museum record counts are computed separately from data/people/*.json by the homepage.

nodes.title: The 2014 protest wave
nodes.summary: Mass demonstrations and a wave of detentions opened the period this archive tracks.
nodes.section_summary: Mass demonstrations spread across Venezuela. Human rights groups documented arrests, abuses, and due-process violations during the state response.

external_metric.label: OVCS recorded at least 9,286 protests in Venezuela in 2014.

nodes.title: The 2017 protest wave
nodes.summary: Protests spread after the Supreme Court attempted to take over legislative powers.
nodes.section_summary: Tens of thousands protested after the government-controlled Supreme Court attempted to usurp the powers of the legislative branch. Demonstrations continued for months.

external_metric.label: Human Rights Watch described demonstrations that spread across the country and continued for months.

nodes.title: Migration surpasses four million
nodes.summary: UNHCR and IOM reported more than four million Venezuelan refugees and migrants worldwide by mid-2019.
nodes.section_summary: UNHCR and IOM reported that the number of refugees and migrants from Venezuela had reached more than four million by mid-2019.

external_metric.label: UNHCR and IOM reported more than four million Venezuelan refugees and migrants by mid-2019.

nodes.title: Post-election mass detentions
nodes.summary: Human rights groups documented mass arrests and abuses after the disputed July 28 election.
nodes.section_summary: After the disputed July 28 presidential election, human rights groups documented mass arrests, arbitrary prosecutions, and abuses against protesters, voters, and critics.

external_metric.label: Amnesty International reported that the Attorney General said as many as 1,062 people were detained in the four days after the July 28 election.

nodes.title: Liberations and families still waiting
nodes.summary: Some names have come home. Many families are still waiting for truth, release, or official answers.
nodes.section_summary: Some names in this archive have come home. Many have not. Some families are still waiting to be told what happened.

external_metric.label: This count is generated from local Museum of Memory profile records.
